en: Long-range heavy cannon. Fits Defense and Execute setups: idle long enough to prime Breach Shot, then reload to refresh the setup cycle.
zh_CN: 远程重型火炮。适合防御和处决构筑：停火蓄势后触发破口射击，再通过换弹刷新循环。

en: Close-range projectile saw. Best for Close and Area builds that want wall-contact pressure, slows, and vulnerability payoffs.
zh_CN: 近距离投射锯刃。适合近战和范围构筑，通过贴墙压制、减速和易伤收益处理敌群。

en: Mid-range charge beam. Builds around Beam and Area choices: Focus Lance pushes single-target pressure, while Prism Fan widens lane control.
zh_CN: 中距离蓄能光束武器。围绕光束和范围构筑展开：聚焦长枪强化单体压制，棱镜扇面扩大控场覆盖。

en: Close melee dash weapon. Triggers on long dash hits, fits Close and Melee builds, and can branch into Freeze control.
zh_CN: 近战冲刺武器。长距离冲刺命中时触发收益，适合近战和接触构筑，也可分支为冻结控制。

en: Short-range fire cone. Core Heat and Area weapon that builds heat during combat, then reloads to turn stored heat into a damage window.
zh_CN: 短距离火焰锥形喷射。核心热量和范围武器，在战斗中积累热量，再通过换弹把储热转化为爆发窗口。

en: Mid-range Freeze cone. Freeze hits trigger Cold Snap as it recharges, supporting Freeze and Area control builds.
zh_CN: 中距离冻结锥形武器。冻结命中会在冷冽回响充能时触发它，支撑冻结和范围控制构筑。

en: Mid-range beam weapon. Fits Beam and Area builds; beam hits spend Focus Channel charges, while branches add tracking or prism coverage.
zh_CN: 中距离光束武器。适合光束和范围构筑；光束命中会消耗聚焦通道充能，分支可补充追踪或棱镜覆盖。

en: Sustained mid-range automatic fire. Core Heat and Projectile weapon: spending magazine ammo before reload expands shared heat capacity.
zh_CN: 中距离持续自动火力。核心热量和投射物武器：换弹前消耗弹匣弹药可扩展共享热量容量。

en: Close support summon. Consumes magazine ammo to deploy slowing satellites, then rewards Defense and On Hit builds when the player is pressured.
zh_CN: 近身支援召唤物。消耗弹匣弹药部署减速卫星，在玩家承压时为防御和命中流构筑提供收益。

en: Auto-targeting sidearm that fires at the nearest enemy in range. Moving continuously primes its passive.
zh_CN: 自动索敌副枪，会攻击范围内最近敌人；连续移动可预热被动。

en: Long-range heavy energy lance. Fits Heat and Projectile builds by spending heat on attacks, then reloading to trigger chain feedback.
zh_CN: 远程重型能量长枪。适合热量和投射物构筑，通过攻击消耗热量，再借由换弹触发连锁反馈。

en: Long-range Area launcher. Slow rockets and growing blasts clear groups, while Cluster Kill charges reward grouped enemy cleanup.
zh_CN: 远程范围发射器。慢速火箭和逐步扩大的爆炸用于清理敌群，集群击杀充能奖励成群清场。

en: Close-range pellet burst. Fits Close and Projectile builds; multiple pellets on one target spend Close Hit charges for bonus final damage.
zh_CN: 近距离弹丸爆发。适合近战和投射物构筑；多个弹丸命中同一目标时消耗近距命中充能，获得额外最终伤害。

en: Long-range Projectile rifle. Fits Mark and Execute-adjacent builds by rewarding far or marked-target hits with charge-based bonus damage.
zh_CN: 远程投射物步枪。适合标记和处决相关构筑，远距离或标记目标命中可获得基于充能的额外伤害。

en: Mid-range Projectile spear. Repeat hits build Mark charge; reload with enough charge to launch a marking radial volley.
zh_CN: 中距离投射长矛。重复命中会积累标记充能；充能足够时换弹会发射施加标记的环形齐射。

en: Repeated damage from the same spear builds charge. Reload at 10 or 20 charge to launch an 8- or 16-direction volley. Its hits mark surviving enemies for 20 seconds and knock them away.
zh_CN: 同一根长矛重复伤害同一敌人可积累充能。充能达到10或20点时换弹，发射8或16方向齐射；命中存活敌人后施加持续20秒的标记并将其击退。

en: Thermal branch: injects heat mechanics and converts shots to fire damage with heat-scaled output.
zh_CN: Thermal branch: injects heat mechanics and converts shots to fire damage with heat-scaled output.

en: Energy cannon branch with low-HP execute bursts against marked enemies.
zh_CN: Energy cannon branch with low-HP execute bursts against marked enemies.

en: First hit arms the saw: it slows down, grows, then explodes at 2x size with physical AoE.
zh_CN: First hit arms the saw: it slows down, grows, then explodes at 2x size with physical AoE.

en: On first hit, saw splits once. The split saw chases the nearest enemy.
zh_CN: On first hit, saw splits once. The split saw chases the nearest enemy.

en: Single-target boss beam: thinner, longer, harder-hitting sustained lance with first-hit lock.
zh_CN: Single-target boss beam: thinner, longer, harder-hitting sustained lance with first-hit lock.

en: Main beam plus two side beams for wide-area coverage, with reduced single-target focus.
zh_CN: Main beam plus two side beams for wide-area coverage, with reduced single-target focus.

en: Dash attacks inflict bonus freeze finish and leave a short-lived frost field.
zh_CN: Dash attacks inflict bonus freeze finish and leave a short-lived frost field.

en: Glacier Projector cone angle expands by 20% without reducing range or damage.
zh_CN: Glacier Projector cone angle expands by 20% without reducing range or damage.

en: Periodically emits a fire pulse centered on the mech, scorching nearby enemies.
zh_CN: Periodically emits a fire pulse centered on the mech, scorching nearby enemies.

en: Extends flamethrower cone reach for safer mid-range burn control.
zh_CN: Extends flamethrower cone reach for safer mid-range burn control.

en: Laser beams independently correct up to 15 degrees toward nearby enemies. With Prism Splitter, each beam tracks its own target without damage loss.
zh_CN: Laser beams independently correct up to 15 degrees toward nearby enemies. With Prism Splitter, each beam tracks its own target without damage loss.

en: Laser shots split into a central beam and two angled prism beams, allowing one shot to sweep multiple lanes.
zh_CN: Laser shots split into a central beam and two angled prism beams, allowing one shot to sweep multiple lanes.

en: Deploys a frontal shield that blocks hostile shots and interrupts enemy movement.
zh_CN: Deploys a frontal shield that blocks hostile shots and interrupts enemy movement.

en: Thermal twin-barrel retrofit for Machine Gun: faster cadence, split lanes, and extra heat buildup.
zh_CN: Thermal twin-barrel retrofit for Machine Gun: faster cadence, split lanes, and extra heat buildup.

en: Orbit spins slower with reduced hit damage, but enemies near satellites take bonus energy damage when hit.
zh_CN: Orbit spins slower with reduced hit damage, but enemies near satellites take bonus energy damage when hit.

en: Orbit hits become freeze damage and apply a small player-to-target knockback.
zh_CN: Orbit hits become freeze damage and apply a small player-to-target knockback.

en: Energy branch: each hit chains arc damage to nearby enemies with falloff.
zh_CN: Energy branch: each hit chains arc damage to nearby enemies with falloff.

en: Freeze branch: shots apply freeze and every third hit releases a shard to nearby enemies.
zh_CN: Freeze branch: shots apply freeze and every third hit releases a shard to nearby enemies.

en: Explosions persist as burning zones for area denial and grouped enemy cleanup.
zh_CN: Explosions persist as burning zones for area denial and grouped enemy cleanup.

en: Fires a spread of reduced-damage rockets to saturate a wider enemy group.
zh_CN: Fires a spread of reduced-damage rockets to saturate a wider enemy group.

en: Freeze pellets can shatter targets after rapid multi-hit bursts.
zh_CN: Freeze pellets can shatter targets after rapid multi-hit bursts.

en: Each pierce increases projectile damage for the remaining hits.
zh_CN: Each pierce increases projectile damage for the remaining hits.

en: Sniper hits trigger physical burst damage around the target.
zh_CN: Sniper hits trigger physical burst damage around the target.

en: Fires 3-5 spears in a spread pattern. Each spear deals reduced damage.
zh_CN: Fires 3-5 spears in a spread pattern. Each spear deals reduced damage.

en: Repeated hits on the same target increase damage. Resets after a time window.
zh_CN: Repeated hits on the same target increase damage. Resets after a time window.

en: No combat. Choose 1 reward option and move to the next level.
zh_CN: No combat. Choose 1 reward option and move to the next level.

en: Harder combat and tighter pacing with better rewards.
zh_CN: Harder combat and tighter pacing with better rewards.

en: Standard battle flow with default rewards.
zh_CN: 标准战斗流程，使用默认奖励。
